projectInfo.projectName: Smart Home Hub - WiFi Connectivity Module

dfmeaItems.failureMode: Connection timeout or failure to establish
dfmeaItems.effects: Device cannot connect to network, user unable to control device remotely
dfmeaItems.causes: Weak signal strength, interference from other devices, incorrect network configuration
dfmeaItems.currentControls: Signal strength monitoring, automatic retry mechanism, user-friendly setup wizard
recommendedActions: Implement adaptive power control for better signal penetration
Add channel selection algorithm to avoid interference
Enhance setup wizard with real-time feedback

dfmeaItems.effects: Unauthorized access to home network, privacy breach, potential for botnet recruitment
dfmeaItems.causes: Weak encryption implementation, insufficient rate limiting, default credentials
dfmeaItems.currentControls: WPA3 encryption, account lockout after failed attempts, secure boot
